params.SpellDescription: Until end of turn, whenever a creature deals combat damage to you, destroy that creature.

remaining_params.SpellDescription: Until end of turn, whenever a creature deals combat damage to you, destroy that creature.

params.SpellDescription: Until end of turn, whenever target creature you control deals combat damage to a creature, destroy the damaged creature.

remaining_params.SpellDescription: Until end of turn, whenever target creature you control deals combat damage to a creature, destroy the damaged creature.
